description_long: This object consists of a small stack of three hardcover books, with the top book featuring a bold red cover and a partially visible photographic image of a person. The top book's cover is slightly glossy, with the edges showing some wear and the pages appearing tightly bound. The middle and bottom books have lighter-colored covers, one with a hint of blue on the spine, and their pages are also visible from the sides. The books are stacked unevenly, creating a casual, slightly disordered appearance. The spines and page edges are clearly defined, and the books' thickness suggests they are standard-sized hardcovers. The overall look is realistic, with visible texturing on the covers and pages.
description: A stack of three hardcover books, with the top book featuring a red cover and photographic imagery, and the others in lighter tones with visible page edges.
description_view_0: The top book's red cover and partial image are clearly visible, with the stack's uneven arrangement and the white and blue accents of the lower books apparent.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the thickness of the books and the layering of the stack, with the red spine and the blue accent on the middle book more prominent.
description_view_2: The red cover and its imagery are seen at an angle, with the blue accent on the middle book's spine and the white lower book both visible.
description_view_3: The stack is viewed from the opposite side, showing the red cover's full length and the pale covers of the lower books, with less detail on the imagery.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a photographic image of a person, rendered in a high-contrast, stylized manner with a red and black color scheme. The image appears somewhat blurred or abstract, focusing on the upper body and face of the individual.
attribute_title_text: HOW TO MAKE MONEY IN YOUR SPARE TIME
attribute_spine_design: The spine of the top book is red with no visible text or decorative elements from the provided views. The spines of the lower books are mostly white, with one showing a blue accent.
